en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid Slovakia Chamber of Commerce and Industry Registration in the Slovakia Trade & Professional Registration Requirements Applicability Assessment.
Slovakia Chamber of Commerce and Industry Registration

The Slovakia Chamber of Commerce and Industry Registration is a business membership within Slovakia’s official chamber network. The registration serves to support businesses through representation, advocacy, legislative updates, export assistance, and networking opportunities provided by the Slovak Chamber of Commerce and Industry. Act No. 9 Coll. on the Chamber of Commerce and Industry Act No. 355 Coll. on Protection, Support and Development of Public Health
